stories.headline: Moment French navy boards suspected Russian 'ghost fleet' tanker

stories.headline: Why Fed Chairman Warsh’s Pivot Risks Confusing Markets
stories.summary: Bill Dudley, former New York Fed President and Bloomberg Opinion columnist, says streamlining the Federal Open Market Committee’s policy statement is appropriate, but Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh needs to make changes with greater care than he has shown to date. Dudley says Warsh may risk confusing markets and the central bank itself. His opinions are his own. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.summary: In a late-night vote aimed at mollifying the president, Senate Republicans rejected a resolution directing him to end the war against Iran, a day after a bipartisan rebuke.
